decision_commentary: All 11 required payload fields present: project_id, phase (D), review_item (client_proposal), reviewed_by (Celia), decision (approve), comment (client approved, contract signed and deposit confirmed), timestamp (ISO-8601), source_channel (instagram), next_action (dispatch_legal), route_to (Legal), sync_to_asana (false). Routing to Legal is correct — legal review runs in parallel with proposal assembly at DG-05/06.
celia_routing_notes: All 11 fields present. route_to field used correctly. Routes to Legal for legal review.
